title: Security Infrastructure -- 351 Cameras, SPD Office, Door Access Control, and Squatter Evictions
summary: Developers detail security improvements: hired full-time security director Josiah Holman coordinating with SPD; 5-person security team operates 24/7 (1 camera monitor + 4 patrol, both campuses). Installed 351 security cameras (interior/exterior) monitored by Reliance Security; assisted in 11+ SPD investigations and 30+ tenant-initiated complaints. Replaced all entrance/exit doors with hardened hardware; doors currently unlocked pending electronic fob access control installation (~1 month out). Without fobs, locking doors causes immediate destruction by intruders. Previously required 70 in-person security shifts over summer due to site design. Cleared 20 units from squatters and drug traffickers, renovated and re-leased to legitimate tenants. Council member questions developer transparency -- doors unlocked for 2+ months not disclosed to tenants. Electric baseboard heat per bedroom, 2 hot water tanks per building. Previous owner completely separated from new ownership. Developers use OneSite software for work order management. Maintenance staff quality control: supervisor random callbacks, detailed work order documentation required, proactive vs reactive approach. Council notes skepticism about information completeness.

political_signal.description: Council members expressing skepticism about developer transparency and questioning completeness of information presented

processing_notes: SPD, IT, Innovation Office in detected_departments are contextual references (SPD coordination, software mention), not acting departments
Reliance Security = contracted camera monitoring company
Josiah Holman = 'Josiah Hman'/'Josiah Homeman' in transcript (garbled)
